# DamnGoal

> Goals, habits, and next steps that adapt when life does. Keep the dream. Bend the plan.

DamnGoal is a calm, emotionally intelligent goal-tracking app (coming soon). No streaks, no guilt, no forced cheerleading. Research-informed design.

## Pages

- Home: https://damngoal.app/
- Research & evidence: https://damngoal.app/research

## What DamnGoal is

A waitlist-stage app for people with meaningful personal goals whose clarity, time, energy, and confidence shift day to day. Users name a direction (goals), show up through small habits and tasks, and adapt when life changes. Rest and skips are built into the system.

## What DamnGoal is not

Not a streak app. Not aggressive gamification. Not clinical mental health treatment. Not a coach that cheerleads or diagnoses.

## Key differentiators

- Connection over completion
- Energy check-in (Good / Low / Rough) right-sizes Today
- Lighter versions on hard days
- Goals can be reached or released without shame
- AI companion when you want it — reflects and asks, never pushes

## Contact / waitlist

Join the waitlist at https://damngoal.app/#waitlist
